name: Myron Floren
abstract: Myron Floren (November 5, 1919 – July 23, 2005) was an American musician best known as the accordionist on The Lawrence Welk Show between 1950 and 1982. Floren came to prominence primarily from his regular appearances on the weekly television series in which Lawrence Welk dubbed him as "the happy Norwegian," which was also attributed to …

concerts.label: American Accordionists' Association Accordion Day Concert

about_quotes.speaker: Bob Havens
about_quotes.evidence: So he had three keyboards and two guitars and of course Myron Floren was the accordion; well it was a very large band.
about_quotes.doc_title: Bob Havens interviewed by Monk Rowe, Chautauqua, New York, September 12, 1997
